404.title: 404 - Page Not Found
404.heading: Oops! This path is closed.
404.desc: The page you are looking for might have moved, or you might have taken a turn into a non-existent corner of our clinic.

footer.copyright: © 2026 An Binh Traditional Clinic. <br class='mobile-only'>All Rights Reserved.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At An Binh Traditional Medicine Clinic, we value your privacy. This policy summarizes how we collect and use your information.

col1.title: 1. Data Collection
col1.text: We only collect information you voluntarily provide via the Booking form (Name, Phone, DOB). This information is solely used to confirm and schedule your appointments.

col2.title: 2. Data Security
col2.text: Your information is transmitted securely and never shared with third parties for commercial purposes. We use trusted services (Netlify, Cloudflare) to keep your data safe.

col3.title: 3. Analytics & Cookies
col3.text: We use Google Analytics anonymously to track website performance and improve user experience. You can disable cookies in your browser at any time.
